name: Roll With Friends
short_description: A challenging ball game where you can compete to climb the top 100 leaderboard, play with friends, or chill in offline single-player mode.
detailed_description:
In this game, you control a ball to complete levels, Each level has a gate that requires all players in co-op mode to be present to advance to the next level, By collecting keys. Use the keys to continue and find crystals to buy items like skins and traps. You can trap your friends for fun or compete to climb the top 100 leaderboard. Host a session to play with up to 5 friends or enjoy offline modes:

  • Hardcore: Every time you lose in a level, the keys respawn, so you need to collect them again. This mode is also for the top 100 leaderboard and speedruns.

  • Singleplayer Normal: Play normally and chill with easier progress where you need to collect keys only once per level. If you lose in the same level, the keys won't respawn, giving you an easier experience.
